notes: 6.3: fixes non-UTF-8 subtitles (GBK/Big5/Shift-JIS/EUC-KR SRT no longer crash) and plugin installs failing with a file-lock (os error 5) when a component is in use. Also: PPTX 10+ slide fix + long-text auto-shrink, hardened mainland-China downloads, GPU→CPU STT fallback, and BabelDOC security floor (CVE-2026-54071). / 6.3：修复非 UTF-8 字幕（GBK/Big5/日文/韩文 SRT 不再崩溃）和插件安装文件占用报错（os error 5）；另含 PPTX 10 页以上错乱修复+长译文自动缩字、国内下载加固、STT GPU→CPU 兜底、BabelDOC 安全加固（CVE-2026-54071）。
